app_secret_token.description: e-conomic app secret token, sent as the X-AppSecretToken request header. Never logged.

agreement_grant_token.description: e-conomic per-agreement grant token, sent as the X-AgreementGrantToken request header. Never logged.

base_url.description: e-conomic API base URL override for tests or proxies.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
